citation.description: `set -e` at line 127 causes the recipe to abort NON-ZERO on any failure (curl 404 → curl exits non-zero → set -e aborts). The test file at tests/unit/test_ci_actionlint_install.py verifies this behavior.

criteria.criterion: `make actionlint-bin` exits NON-ZERO and installs no binary when the download fails (nonexistent version → HTTP 404). Proving command: `pytest tests/unit/test_ci_actionlint_install.py`

citation.description: Lines 133-136: curl downloads the tarball, sha256sum -c --strict verifies it, tar extracts it, and the 'installed' echo only runs if all preceding steps succeed (enforced by set -e at line 127).

criteria.criterion: A successful download still verifies (sha256) and installs the binary (exit 0).

citation.description: Changes are in the actionlint-bin recipe (lines 121-137) and the new test file tests/unit/test_ci_actionlint_install.py. No other Makefile targets were modified.

criteria.criterion: Fix confined to the `actionlint-bin` recipe (+ the guard test).
